method: COMMENT_EVALUATION 2026-06-03 — evaluated on text. Dual-cluster rule applied: each route candidate inspected for content bridging M08 (Pride); NONE bridge (77 parresia = godly boldness not self-elevation; 42 hedone = pleasure/will->M29; 125 will->M29), so single-cluster routes, no dual findings. Substantive notes routed to preserve content; superseded structural notes set_aside.

new_observations.title: Pride dual-register: human pride and divine majesty share vocabulary
new_observations.description: Registry 123 (pride) carries a dual-register: human pride and divine majesty share the same roots (ga.ah, ga.on, rum, ra.mam); the kauchaomai groups make the structure explicit. Adopted into M08 from A7 finding id 86 (DIMENSION_REVIEW) as a cluster-scope structural observation. The same vocabulary names both an inflated human self-elevation and a legitimate divine exaltation.
